title: mesosphaerum mollissimum
intro: Mesosphaerum mollissimum, also known as Pennyroyal or Lemon Balm, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, headaches, and menstrual cramps. The health benefits of Mesosphaerum mollissimum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and relieving symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. It can be prepared as a tea, oil, or tincture, with the most common herbal preparations being infusions and topical applications.
